channel.title: How To Use Widgets
channel.description:
Hello
I've been exploring Frontity recently, as a way to learn React, and with the intention of replacing the theme of an existing WordPress site I have.
However I've realised that I don't think I can use my existing WordPress widgets? Am I correct?
Things like Jetpack newsletter sign-up widget, search widget...well they are the only two that I can think of.
Any thoughts?
Thanks James

item.title: How To Use Widgets
item.dc:creator: fishoutdolanout
item.description:
Did anyone get chance to see if this is possible?

Read full topic

item.title: How To Use Widgets
item.dc:creator: fishoutdolanout
item.description:
Hello

I’ve been exploring Frontity recently, as a way to learn React, and with the intention of replacing the theme of an existing WordPress site I have.

However I’ve realised that I don’t think I can use my existing WordPress widgets? Am I correct?

Things like Jetpack newsletter sign-up widget, search widget…well they are the only two that I can think of.

Any thoughts?

Thanks
James

Read full topic
